body:
With @henryg888, we made these changes to make these shallow water benchmarks.

Next, we will introduce code to plot the results, as can be found in #1722
title: Introduce `Flat` to shallow water benchmarks

body:
This PR implements a relatively simple convective adjustment scheme that provides the option for convective adjustment of both momentum and tracers. The closure scheme implements only a vertical diffusivity, and has a convenience "background diffusivity" in addition to a convective diffusivity that is active when the buoyancy gradient is unstable. Both the convective and background diffusivities may be functions of space and time, or may be discrete fields, and can be different for each tracer.

Here's a result from a new validation test:

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/15271942/120872660-cf88cc00-c54b-11eb-991a-8ff835bd3eb0.png)

I also need to add unit tests.
title: ConvectiveAdjustmentVerticalDiffusivity
